positive: A breathtaking, symmetrical mandala composition featuring stylized celestial elements, blooming bioluminescent flowers, and geometric cosmic patterns. The main subject is a central nexus of light where ethereal vapor meets crystallized flora. Use deep sapphire blues, vibrant emerald greens, and accents of glowing gold/iridescent silver. The style is neo-art deco illustration combined with Japanese woodblock print detailing. Composition must be highly symmetrical and suitable for repeating textile prints, with crisp, clean outlines and high contrast against a dark background. Perfect silhouette for apparel.
negative: text, lettering, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, low detail, blurry, artifact, grain, messy, messy composition, abstract bokeh, misplaced limbs, bad anatomy, deformed, noise, grain
